---
title: "Copyfight"
description: |
  Book on piracy and free culture
date: 2013-01-30
author: 
  - name: Adriano Belisario
site-url: https://github.com/belisards/EPUB-Copyfight
image: "cover.png"
image-alt: Copyfight cover page.
categories: [organizer, author]
open-graph: false
draft: false
---

<!--------------- set up ----------------->

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'hide'

long_slug <- "copyfight"

# NOTE: after finishing post, run renv::snapshot() and copy the renv.lock file 
# from the project root into the post directory
# renv::use(lockfile = "renv.lock")
```

<!--------------- post content ----------------->
